ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weekly_scores" (
  "week_end" TEXT /* Date representing the end of the week */,
  "sourcecred_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score for the SourceCred platform */,
  "discord_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score for the Discord platform */,
  "discourse_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score for the Discourse platform */,
  "github_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score for the GitHub platform */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total engagement score for the week across all platforms */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average engagement score for the week across all platforms */,
  "platform_count" INTEGER /* Number of platforms where engagement was recorded for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_end")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users on the platform */,
  "engagement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of engagement (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, moderator, admin) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Level of user engagement (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made by the user */,
  "reward_count" INTEGER /* Total number of rewards received by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Engagement score for the week */,
  "week_end" TEXT /* Date representing the end of the week */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, code commit) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contribution */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the contribution was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, design) */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the contribution (e.g., based on community feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reward was given */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, certificate, monetary) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value of the reward (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "platforms_included" TEXT /* List of platforms included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (e.g., in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's purpose */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "average_engagement" REAL /* Average engagement score of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Level of engagement within the team */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made by the user within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the contribution */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the contribution was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, design) */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the contribution (e.g., based on community feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_contributions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_contributions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
